backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no implemented logic.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature requirements to related frontend files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of many frontend React components and content files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining light/dark theme variables and global base styles.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML document mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app composing all site sections, header/footer, background visuals, and audio manager.
frontend/src/components/audio/Background: Manages looping background audio with autoplay fallback and user-gesture retry logic.
frontend/src/components/layout/Section.t: Reusable section wrapper providing title, subtitle, icon, separator, and layout structure.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: Footer with extreme haunt warning alert and attribution notice.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteHeade: Sticky header with logo, scroll-reactive styling, smooth-scroll navigation, and mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/sections/auditio: Lists audition perks using cards with icons, titles, and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Auditio: Displays audition details, perks, and a list of roles with badges and descriptions using cards and UI components.
frontend/src/components/sections/ClownTo: Shows an interior elevation image of Clown Town with descriptive text inside a styled card section.
frontend/src/components/sections/FoodBoo: Renders food booth cards with images, pricing alerts, descriptions, and menus sourced from content files.
frontend/src/components/sections/Haunted: Displays a grid of haunted house attraction cards with images, descriptions, scenes, and wait time info.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomeHer: Provides the homepage hero with background imagery, logo, text, and a button that scrolls to the auditions section.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomePro: Shows a procession preview with an image and descriptive text about the 6pm parade of characters.
frontend/src/components/sections/InfoLoc: Presents operating hours, ticket info, and rules in multiple cards with icons and alerts.
frontend/src/components/sections/MerchSh: Renders a merch shops section displaying shop cards with name, items, price, and a footer note.
frontend/src/components/sections/ScareZo: Displays scare zone cards with generated images, names, taglines, and descriptions inside a themed section.
frontend/src/components/sections/Teaser2: Shows a teaser section for two upcoming 2027 haunted houses with titles, taglines, and teaser descriptions.
frontend/src/components/sections/TeaserS: Provides a simple teaser card announcing future upcoming content.
frontend/src/components/theme/HorrorBack: Applies layered fixed-position background effects including gradients, noise, and scanlines for a horror theme.
frontend/src/content/foodBooths.ts: Defines data for multiple themed food booths including names, taglines, descriptions, and menus.
frontend/src/content/generatedImages.ts: Maps content names to paths of AI‑generated image assets for houses, scare zones, and food booths.
frontend/src/content/hauntedHouses.ts: Provides haunted house data including names, taglines, descriptions, scenes, and location info.
frontend/src/content/merchShops.ts: Contains merch shop data listing shop names, items sold, prices, and a general note.
frontend/src/content/scareZones.ts: Defines scare zone data with names, taglines, and detailed descriptions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages a backend actor based on user identity and refreshes dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and provider for managing Internet Identity authentication, exposing identity state and login/logout helpers.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles and custom horror-themed OKLCH color variables, plus utility classes like radial gradients and stylized text.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, wrapping it with React Query and the Internet Identity provider before rendering.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with dark mode, custom OKLCH color tokens, extended utilities, animations, and plugin integrations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state, feature requirements, and pending updates for adding a Food/Training/Scary Vibes layout block on the homepage auditions section.
